description: Primary KoalaByte Blue firmware theme with eucalyptus branch borders, bark/gold jungle title styling, blue KoalaByte Blue accent text, cleaned menu text boxes, and purple/green glowing eyes.

visual_style.border_style: leafy eucalyptus branches around text/menu items
visual_style.title_style: large chunky carved jungle lettering inspired by the approved KoalaByte Blue poster reference
visual_style.menu_layout_rule: All labels and descriptions must stay inside rounded text boxes; descriptions wrap inside the right-side description area with no overlap.
visual_style.font_license_note: No third-party font file is bundled. Use licensed fonts only in private/custom builds.

menu.selected_item_style: leafy rounded textbox with cyber green edge glow
menu.text_box_policy: no overlapping words; all words must remain inside each row border
